name: app.R
content:
library(shiny)
library(visNetwork)
library(FactoMineR)
library(SensoMineR)

# ============================================================
# Load data
# ============================================================

if (!exists("qda_data")) {
  qda_data <- tryCatch({
    d <- read.csv("perfumes_qda.csv", sep = ";", header = TRUE)
    d$Panelist <- as.factor(d$Panelist)
    d$Product  <- as.factor(d$Product)
    d
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
}

# ============================================================
# Sections (colors)
# ============================================================

parties <- data.frame(
  id    = c("depart",   "modele",              "automatisation"),
  label = c("Start",   "Model an attribute", "Automate with decat() and describe the products"),
  color  = c("#F3E5F5", "#BBDEFB",              "#C8E6C9"),
  border = c("#7B1FA2", "#1976D2",              "#2E7D32"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

partie_color  <- setNames(parties$color,  parties$id)
partie_border <- setNames(parties$border, parties$id)
partie_label  <- setNames(parties$label,  parties$id)

# ============================================================
# Case constructor
# ============================================================

make_case <- function(partie, titre, objectif, code,
                      sortie_attendue, transition,
                      has_plot = FALSE,
                      question = NULL, reponse = NULL,
                      code_display = NULL) {
  if (is.null(code_display)) code_display <- code
  list(
    partie = partie, titre = titre, objectif = objectif,
    code = trimws(code), code_display = trimws(code_display),
    sortie_attendue = sortie_attendue, transition = transition,
    has_plot = has_plot, question = question, reponse = reponse
  )
}

get_case_display_code <- function(case) {
  if (!is.null(case$code_display) && nzchar(trimws(case$code_display)))
    return(trimws(case$code_display))
  case$code
}

# ============================================================
# Cases
# ============================================================

cases <- list(
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # CASE 0 — Introduction
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  intro = make_case(
    partie = "depart",
    titre   = "The Playing Field",
    objectif = "Explore the QDA (Quantitative Descriptive Analysis) dataset and understand the sensory analysis problem.",
    has_plot = TRUE,
    code = "
if (!exists('qda_data')) {
  qda_data <- read.csv(
    'perfumes_qda.csv',
    sep = ';', header = TRUE)
  qda_data$Panelist <- as.factor(qda_data$Panelist)
  qda_data$Product  <- as.factor(qda_data$Product)
}

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('Dataset: tasting of 12 perfumes\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
cat('Context: 12 trained panelists rate 12 perfumes on 12\\n')
cat('sensory attributes, twice (2 sessions).\\n\\n')
cat('Dimensions :', nrow(qda_data), 'rows,', ncol(qda_data), 'columns\\n')
cat('Panelists  :', nlevels(qda_data$Panelist), '-', paste(levels(qda_data$Panelist), collapse = ', '), '\\n')
cat('Products   :', nlevels(qda_data$Product), '-', paste(levels(qda_data$Product), collapse = ', '), '\\n')
cat('Attributes :', paste(names(qda_data)[5:16], collapse = ', '), '\\n')

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('Is each perfume rated the same way by everyone ?\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
sous <- qda_data[qda_data$Product == levels(qda_data$Product)[1], 'Heady']
cat('Example for the Heady attribute on', levels(qda_data$Product)[1], ':\\n')
cat('n =', length(sous), '| mean =', round(mean(sous), 2),
    '| sd =', round(sd(sous), 2), '\\n')
cat('-> The rating varies from one panelist to another: we will build a model\\n')
cat('   that separates the Product effect from the Panelist effect.\\n')

op <- par(mar = c(8, 4, 3, 1))
boxplot(Heady ~ Product, data = qda_data, las = 2,
        col = '#BBDEFB', border = '#1976D2',
        ylab = 'Heady rating', xlab = '',
        main = 'Spread of the Heady rating by product')
par(op)

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('The question decat() answers\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
cat('For each sensory attribute: are the products\\n')
cat('significantly differentiated, once the panelist effect is removed ?\\n')
",
code_display = "
# Load the dataset

qda_data <- read.csv(
  'perfumes_qda.csv',
  sep = ';', header = TRUE)

# Panelist and Product are explanatory variables in our model, so we convert them to factors

qda_data$Panelist <- as.factor(qda_data$Panelist)
qda_data$Product  <- as.factor(qda_data$Product)

# Preview of the dataset

head(qda_data)
summary(qda_data[, 1:6])

# Visualization: spread of an attribute by product

op <- par(mar = c(8, 4, 3, 1))
boxplot(Heady ~ Product, data = qda_data, las = 2,
        col = '#BBDEFB', border = '#1976D2',
        ylab = 'Heady rating', xlab = '',
        main = 'Spread of the Heady rating by product')
par(op)

## Each perfume receives several ratings (one per panelist, per session):
## We therefore need a statistical model that will let us test these differences.
",
sortie_attendue = "Exploration of the QDA dataset with a description of its dimensions and a boxplot by product.",
transition = "Before automating, let's start by modeling a single attribute.",
question = "Which R function converts a variable into a factor ?",
reponse  = "as.factor"
  ),

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# CASE 1 — LinearModel on a single attribute
# ----------------------------------------------------------
modele_lineaire = make_case(
  partie = "modele",
  titre   = "Model an attribute: LinearModel()",
  objectif = "Understand the two-factor ANOVA model (Product + Panelist) applied to a single descriptor, using FactoMineR::LinearModel().",
  has_plot = TRUE,
  code = "
if (!exists('qda_data')) {
  qda_data <- read.csv(
    'perfumes_qda.csv',
    sep = ';', header = TRUE)
  qda_data$Panelist <- as.factor(qda_data$Panelist)
  qda_data$Product  <- as.factor(qda_data$Product)
}

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('Model: Heady ~ Product + Panelist\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
cat('We explain the variability of the Heady descriptor with two effects :\\n')
cat('  - Product  : product effect -> what we are interested in\\n')
cat('  - Panelist : panelist effect -> to be removed from the raw rating\\n')

res_lm <- LinearModel(Heady ~ Product + Panelist, data = qda_data)

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('Analysis of variance table (Ftest)\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
print(res_lm$Ftest)

p_product <- res_lm$Ftest['Product', 'Pr(>F)']
cat('\\np-value for the Product effect :', format.pval(p_product, digits = 3), '\\n')
if (p_product < 0.05) {
  cat('-> The 12 perfumes are significantly differentiated on Heady.\\n')
} else {
  cat('-> No significant difference between perfumes on Heady.\\n')
}

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('Coefficients by product (Ttest)\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
coefs <- res_lm$Ttest[grep('^Product', rownames(res_lm$Ttest)), ]
print(round(coefs, 3))
cat('\\nThe most Heady product is the one with the highest coefficient :\\n')
cat(' ->', rownames(coefs)[which.max(coefs[, 'Estimate'])], '\\n')

coefs_vec <- coefs[, 'Estimate']
names(coefs_vec) <- gsub('Product - ', '', rownames(coefs))
coefs_vec <- sort(coefs_vec)
op <- par(mar = c(4, 11, 3, 1))
barplot(coefs_vec, horiz = TRUE, las = 1,
        col = ifelse(coefs_vec > 0, '#EF6C00', '#1976D2'),
        main = 'Heady coefficient by product (alpha_i)',
        xlab = 'Deviation from the overall mean')
abline(v = 0, lty = 2)
par(op)
",
code_display = "
# Two-factor ANOVA model on a single attribute

res_lm <- LinearModel(Heady ~ Product + Panelist, data = qda_data)

# names(res_lm) -> 'Ftest' 'Ttest' 'call' 'lmResult'

# From a macro point of view: are the products differentiated on Heady ?

res_lm$Ftest

## SS = sum of squares, MS = SS/df, F value, Pr(>F) = p-value

# At a finer level: what is the coefficient of each product ?

res_lm$Ttest

## Estimate = alpha_i: deviation of the product from the overall mean
## The most 'Heady' product has the highest coefficient

# Plotting the Heady coefficients by product

coefs <- res_lm$Ttest[grep('^Product', rownames(res_lm$Ttest)), ]
coefs_vec <- coefs[, 'Estimate']
names(coefs_vec) <- gsub('Product - ', '', rownames(coefs))
coefs_vec <- sort(coefs_vec)

barplot(coefs_vec, horiz = TRUE, las = 1,
        col = ifelse(coefs_vec > 0, '#EF6C00', '#1976D2'),
        main = 'Heady coefficient by product',
        xlab = 'Deviation from the overall mean')
abline(v = 0, lty = 2)
",
sortie_attendue = "Ftest and Ttest from LinearModel() on Heady, with products ranked from least to most Heady.",
transition = "Redoing this model by hand for 12 attributes would take a long time: time to automate.",
question = "How are the Product and Panelist variables characterized in our model - are they response or explanatory variables ?",
reponse  = "explanatory"
),

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# CASE 2 — decat(): automatic p-values
# ----------------------------------------------------------
decat_pvalues = make_case(
  partie = "automatisation",
  titre   = "Automate with decat()",
  objectif = "Run the Product + Panelist model on all 12 sensory attributes at once with decat(), and identify the most discriminating attributes.",
  has_plot = TRUE,
  code = "
if (!exists('qda_data')) {
  qda_data <- read.csv(
    'perfumes_qda.csv',
    sep = ';', header = TRUE)
  qda_data$Panelist <- as.factor(qda_data$Panelist)
  qda_data$Product  <- as.factor(qda_data$Product)
}

res_decat <- decat(qda_data,
                   formul = '~Product+Panelist',
                   firstvar = 5,
                   graph = FALSE)

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('decat(): automate LinearModel() on each attribute\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
cat('decat() applies the Product + Panelist model to EVERY sensory\\n')
cat('column starting at firstvar (here column 5: Spicy).\\n\\n')
cat('Available objects :', paste(names(res_decat), collapse = ', '), '\\n')
cat('  tabF    : p-value of the product F-test, for each attribute\\n')
cat('  tabT    : significance of the product coefficients\\n')
cat('  coeff   : coefficients (alpha_i) by product and attribute\\n')
cat('  adjmean : adjusted means by product and attribute\\n')
cat('  resF/resT : detailed lists, one element per product\\n')

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('p-values of the F-test (Product effect), sorted\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
pv <- res_decat$tabF[, 1]
names(pv) <- rownames(res_decat$tabF)
pv <- sort(pv)
print(round(pv, 4))

cat('\\nMost discriminating attributes (lowest p-values) :\\n')
cat(' ->', paste(names(pv)[1:3], collapse = ', '), '\\n')
cat('Least discriminating attribute :\\n')
cat(' ->', names(pv)[length(pv)], '\\n')

op <- par(mar = c(7, 4, 3, 1))
barplot(pv, las = 2,
        col = ifelse(pv < 0.05, '#2E7D32', '#BDBDBD'),
        main = 'P-value of the product F-test, by attribute',
        ylab = 'p-value')
abline(h = 0.05, col = 'red', lty = 2, lwd = 2)
par(op)
",
code_display = "
# Automate the model across all 12 attributes at once

res_decat <- decat(qda_data,
                   formul = '~Product+Panelist',
                   firstvar = 5,   ## position of the 1st attribute column
                   graph = FALSE)

names(res_decat)

## 'tabF' 'tabT' 'coeff' 'adjmean' 'resF' 'resT'

# p-value of the Product effect, for each attribute

pv <- res_decat$tabF[, 1]
names(pv) <- rownames(res_decat$tabF)
sort(pv)

## An attribute with a p-value < 0.05 shows that it significantly structures the products

# Quick plot

barplot(sort(pv), las = 2,
        col = ifelse(sort(pv) < 0.05, '#2E7D32', '#BDBDBD'),
        main = 'P-value of the product F-test, by attribute',
        ylab = 'p-value')
abline(h = 0.05, col = 'red', lty = 2, lwd = 2)
",
sortie_attendue = "Table of p-values sorted by attribute and a bar chart identifying the most discriminating attributes.",
transition = "Significant attributes structure the product space: let's now look at the adjusted means.",
question = "In the end, were the products differentiated on the Heady attribute ? (Yes/No)",
reponse  = "Yes"
),

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# CASE 3 — decat(): adjusted means AND automatic description (Vtest)
# ----------------------------------------------------------
decat_interpretation = make_case(
  partie = "automatisation",
  titre   = "Sensory profile and automatic description of a product",
  objectif = "adjmean, res_decat$resT and examine the Vtest",
  has_plot = TRUE,
  code = "
if (!exists('qda_data')) {
  qda_data <- read.csv(
    'perfumes_qda.csv',
    sep = ';', header = TRUE)
  qda_data$Panelist <- as.factor(qda_data$Panelist)
  qda_data$Product  <- as.factor(qda_data$Product)
}
res_decat <- decat(qda_data,
                   formul = '~Product+Panelist',
                   firstvar = 5,
                   graph = FALSE)

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('adjmean: adjusted mean = mean corrected for the panelist effect\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
cat('One row per product, one column per attribute.\\n')
cat('Dimensions :', nrow(res_decat$adjmean), 'products x',
    ncol(res_decat$adjmean), 'attributes\\n\\n')
print(round(res_decat$adjmean, 2))

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('Sensory profile of a product: Angel\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
profil_angel <- sort(unlist(res_decat$adjmean['Angel', ]), decreasing = TRUE)
print(round(profil_angel, 2))

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('resT: automatic description of each product\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
cat('res_decat$resT contains one table per product, with, for each\\n')
cat('SIGNIFICANT attribute: Coeff, Adjust mean, P-value, Vtest.\\n')
cat('Available products :', paste(names(res_decat$resT), collapse = ', '), '\\n')

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('Description of Angel\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
res_angel <- res_decat$resT$Angel
print(round(res_angel, 3))

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('Description of Coco Mademoiselle\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
res_coco <- res_decat$resT$`Coco Mademoiselle`
print(round(res_coco, 3))

cat('\\n============================================================\\n')
cat('Reading the Vtest\\n')
cat('============================================================\\n')
cat('Vtest > 0: the product is rated significantly higher on\\n')
cat('           this attribute than the overall mean.\\n')
cat('Vtest < 0: the product is rated significantly lower.\\n')
cat('|Vtest| > ~2 roughly corresponds to a p-value < 0.05.\\n\\n')
top_pos <- rownames(res_angel)[which.max(res_angel[, 'Vtest'])]
top_neg <- rownames(res_angel)[which.min(res_angel[, 'Vtest'])]
cat('Angel is most positively characterized by :', top_pos, '\\n')
cat('Angel is most negatively characterized by :', top_neg, '\\n')

vt <- sort(res_angel[, 'Vtest'])
op <- par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 8, 3, 1))
barplot(sort(profil_angel), horiz = TRUE, las = 1,
        col = '#7B1FA2',
        main = 'Sensory profile of Angel\n(adjusted means)',
        xlab = 'Adjusted mean rating')
barplot(vt, horiz = TRUE, las = 1,
        col = ifelse(vt > 0, '#1976D2', '#C62828'),
        main = 'Angel: significant\nattributes (Vtest)',
        xlab = 'Vtest')
abline(v = 0, lty = 1)
abline(v = c(-1.96, 1.96), lty = 2, col = 'grey40')
par(op)
",
code_display = "
# The adjusted means table: the sensory profile of the products

res_decat$adjmean

## One row per product, one column per attribute
## Each value = the product's mean on that attribute,
## corrected for the panelist effect

profil_angel <- sort(unlist(res_decat$adjmean['Angel', ]), decreasing = TRUE)
profil_angel

# resT: an automatic description per product (only significant attributes appear here)

names(res_decat$resT)

res_angel <- res_decat$resT$Angel
res_angel

## Coeff       : alpha_i, deviation from the overall mean
## Adjust mean : adjusted mean (= overall mean + Coeff)
## P-value     : significance of the coefficient
## Vtest       : standardized version of the coefficient (Vtest > 0 -> product rated higher than the mean, Vtest < 0 -> product rated lower)

res_coco <- res_decat$resT$`Coco Mademoiselle`
res_coco

# Two plots: full profile and significant attributes

vt <- sort(res_angel[, 'Vtest'])
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
barplot(sort(profil_angel), horiz = TRUE, las = 1,
        col = '#7B1FA2',
        main = 'Sensory profile of Angel',
        xlab = 'Adjusted mean rating')
barplot(vt, horiz = TRUE, las = 1,
        col = ifelse(vt > 0, '#1976D2', '#C62828'),
        main = 'Angel: significant attributes (Vtest)',
        xlab = 'Vtest')
abline(v = 0, lty = 1)
abline(v = c(-1.96, 1.96), lty = 2, col = 'grey40')
",
sortie_attendue = "Table of adjusted means, sensory profile of a product, and automatic description (Coeff, p-value, Vtest) of two products.",
transition = "The decat() journey is complete - now just head to your nearest decathlon, haha.",
question = "On how many attributes did the decat() function let us automate our tests ?",
reponse  = "12"
)
)

# ============================================================
# Board — linear chain
# ============================================================

edges <- data.frame(
  from   = c("intro",           "modele_lineaire", "decat_pvalues"),
  to     = c("modele_lineaire", "decat_pvalues",   "decat_interpretation"),
  arrows = "to",
  smooth = FALSE,
  label  = "",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

plateau_positions <- data.frame(
  id = c("intro", "modele_lineaire", "decat_pvalues", "decat_interpretation"),
  x  = c(-1200,    -400,              400,             1200),
  y  = c(0,         0,                0,               0),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# ============================================================
# Utilities
# ============================================================

normaliser <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  x <- iconv(x, from = "", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- gsub(",", ".", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("\\(\\)$", "", x)
  x
}

make_blank_plot <- function() {
  f <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  png(filename = f, width = 800, height = 500, res = 100)
  plot.new()
  text(0.5, 0.5, "No plot yet", cex = 1.2)
  dev.off()
  f
}

render_value_pedagogique <- function(x, max_chars = 1800, max_depth = 2, depth = 0, name = NULL) {
  prefix <- if (!is.null(name)) paste0("$", name, "\n") else ""
  if (is.null(x))  { cat(prefix); cat("NULL\n"); return(invisible(NULL)) }
  if (is.character(x)) {
    txt <- paste(x, collapse = "\n")
    if (nchar(txt) > max_chars)
      txt <- paste0(substr(txt, 1, max_chars), "\n\n[... output truncated]\n")
    cat(prefix); cat(txt); cat("\n"); return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  if (is.data.frame(x) || is.matrix(x) || inherits(x, "table")) { cat(prefix); print(x); return(invisible(NULL)) }
  if (is.atomic(x)) { cat(prefix); print(x); return(invisible(NULL)) }
  if (is.list(x)) {
    cat(prefix)
    cat("Object of type list")
    if (!is.null(class(x))) cat(" - class: ", paste(class(x), collapse = ", "), sep = "")
    nms <- names(x)
    if (!is.null(nms)) cat("\nFields: ", paste(nms, collapse = ", "), "\n", sep = "")
    else cat("\nLength: ", length(x), "\n", sep = "")
    if (depth >= max_depth) { cat("[Display limited]\n"); return(invisible(NULL)) }
    if (length(x) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
    n_show <- min(length(x), 6)
    for (i in seq_len(n_show)) {
      nm <- if (!is.null(nms) && nzchar(nms[i])) nms[i] else paste0("[[", i, "]]")
      cat("\n--- ", nm, " ---\n", sep = "")
      render_value_pedagogique(x[[i]], max_chars, max_depth, depth + 1)
    }
    if (length(x) > n_show) cat("\n[... ", length(x) - n_show, " element(s) not shown ...]\n", sep = "")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  cat(prefix); print(x); invisible(NULL)
}

eval_code_capture <- function(code, envir = .GlobalEnv) {
  old_width <- getOption("width")
  on.exit(options(width = 160), add = TRUE)
  options(width = 160)
  exprs <- parse(text = code)
  out <- character()
  for (expr in exprs) {
    one <- capture.output({
      withCallingHandlers({
        res <- withVisible(eval(expr, envir = envir))
        if (isTRUE(res$visible) && !is.null(res$value)) render_value_pedagogique(res$value)
      },
      message = function(m) { cat(conditionMessage(m), "\n"); invokeRestart("muffleMessage") },
      warning = function(w) { cat("Warning: ", conditionMessage(w), "\n", sep = ""); invokeRestart("muffleWarning") })
    })
    out <- c(out, one)
  }
  paste(out, collapse = "\n")
}

execute_case <- function(case, envir = .GlobalEnv, blank_plot = NULL) {
  code <- case$code
  if (isTRUE(case$has_plot)) {
    plot_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
    png(filename = plot_file, width = 1400, height = 760, res = 120)
    sortie <- tryCatch(eval_code_capture(code, envir = envir),
                       error = function(e) paste("Error:", conditionMessage(e)),
                       finally = dev.off())
    list(output = sortie, plot_file = plot_file, has_plot = TRUE)
  } else {
    sortie <- tryCatch(eval_code_capture(code, envir = envir),
                       error = function(e) paste("Error:", conditionMessage(e)))
    list(output = sortie, plot_file = blank_plot, has_plot = FALSE)
  }
}

check_answer <- function(case, answer) {
  if (is.null(case$reponse)) return(TRUE)
  identical(normaliser(answer), normaliser(case$reponse))
}

# ============================================================
# Saving
# ============================================================

plateau_save_dir     <- function() { d <- tools::R_user_dir("app_decat_en", which = "cache"); dir.create(d, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE); d }
plateau_state_file   <- function() file.path(plateau_save_dir(), "state.rds")
plateau_objects_file <- function() file.path(plateau_save_dir(), "objects.rds")
plateau_plot_file    <- function() file.path(plateau_save_dir(), "last_plot.png")

plateau_object_names <- function() c("qda_data",
                                     "res_lm",
                                     "res_decat",
                                     "res_angel", "res_coco")

save_global_objects <- function(envir = .GlobalEnv) {
  objs <- plateau_object_names()
  objs <- objs[vapply(objs, exists, logical(1), envir = envir, inherits = FALSE)]
  if (length(objs) == 0) { saveRDS(list(), plateau_objects_file()); return(invisible(character(0))) }
  saveRDS(mget(objs, envir = envir, inherits = FALSE), plateau_objects_file())
  invisible(objs)
}

load_global_objects <- function(envir = .GlobalEnv) {
  f <- plateau_objects_file()
  if (!file.exists(f)) return(invisible(character(0)))
  obj_list <- readRDS(f)
  if (length(obj_list) > 0) list2env(obj_list, envir = envir)
  invisible(names(obj_list))
}

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

# ============================================================
# UI
# ============================================================

ui <- fluidPage(
  tags$head(tags$style(HTML("
    #code_affiche, #sortie {
      height: 400px; max-height: 400px;
      overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: auto;
      margin: 0; box-sizing: border-box;
    }
  "))),
  
  div(style = "background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1976D2, #2E7D32); color: white; padding: 18px; margin-bottom: 15px;",
      h2("Sensory Analysis: decat()", style = "margin: 0;"),
      p("Learn statistics with R - Albin FEVRIER | Institut Agro Rennes",
        style = "margin: 5px 0 0 0; opacity: 0.85;")
  ),
  
  div(style = "padding: 8px 15px; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 6px; margin: 0 15px 12px 15px; font-size: 13px;",
      strong("Path: "),
      span(style = "background:#F3E5F5; border:2px solid #7B1FA2; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:4px; margin-right:6px;", "Start"),
      span(style = "background:#BBDEFB; border:2px solid #1976D2; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:4px; margin-right:6px;", "Model an attribute"),
      span(style = "background:#C8E6C9; border:2px solid #2E7D32; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:4px;", "Automate with decat() and describe the products")
  ),
  
  div(style = "padding: 0 15px 8px 15px;",
      fluidRow(
        column(3, actionButton("save_state",  "Save",    class = "btn-primary btn-sm")),
        column(3, actionButton("load_state",  "Resume",  class = "btn-warning btn-sm")),
        column(3, actionButton("clear_state", "Clear",   class = "btn-danger btn-sm")),
        column(3, uiOutput("save_status"))
      )
  ),
  
  div(style = "padding: 0 15px 12px 15px;",
      fluidRow(
        column(4, actionButton("fit_plateau",    "Recenter",       class = "btn-primary btn-sm")),
        column(4, actionButton("focus_selected", "Center on node", class = "btn-primary btn-sm")),
        column(4, actionButton("zoom_case",      "Zoom",           class = "btn-primary btn-sm"))
      ),
      br(),
      visNetworkOutput("plateau", height = "220px")
  ),
  
  div(style = "padding:12px; background:white; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:6px; margin:0 15px 12px 15px;",
      h4("Active challenge", style = "margin-top:0;"),
      uiOutput("case_info"),
      hr(),
      uiOutput("question_ui"),
      fluidRow(
        column(6, actionButton("valider",  "Submit", class = "btn-primary")),
        column(6, actionButton("executer", "Run",    class = "btn-success"))
      )
  ),
  hr(),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(6,
           div(style = "padding:0 15px;",
               h4("Simplified code"),
               verbatimTextOutput("code_affiche")
           )
    ),
    column(6,
           div(style = "padding:0 15px;",
               h4("Console output"),
               verbatimTextOutput("sortie")
           )
    )
  ),
  hr(),
  
  div(style = "padding:0 15px 15px 15px;",
      h4("Plot"),
      uiOutput("plot_status"),
      imageOutput("graphique", height = "auto")
  )
)

# ============================================================
# SERVER
# ============================================================

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  blank_plot    <- make_blank_plot()
  selected_case <- reactiveVal("intro")
  
  etat <- reactiveValues(
    unlocked      = c("intro"),
    visited       = character(0),
    output_text   = "",
    plot_file     = blank_plot,
    last_has_plot = FALSE,
    run_id        = 0,
    running       = FALSE
  )
  
  last_save_time <- reactiveVal(NULL)
  if (file.exists(plateau_state_file())) last_save_time(file.info(plateau_state_file())$mtime)
  
  save_current_session <- function(silent = FALSE) {
    saveRDS(list(
      timestamp = Sys.time(), selected = selected_case(),
      unlocked = etat$unlocked, visited = etat$visited,
      output_text = etat$output_text, last_has_plot = etat$last_has_plot,
      run_id = etat$run_id
    ), plateau_state_file())
    saved <- save_global_objects(.GlobalEnv)
    if (isTRUE(etat$last_has_plot) && !is.null(etat$plot_file) && file.exists(etat$plot_file)) {
      src <- normalizePath(etat$plot_file, mustWork = FALSE)
      dst <- normalizePath(plateau_plot_file(), mustWork = FALSE)
      if (!identical(src, dst)) file.copy(etat$plot_file, plateau_plot_file(), overwrite = TRUE)
    }
    last_save_time(Sys.time())
    if (!silent) showNotification(paste0("Saved: ", length(saved), " object(s)."), type = "message")
    invisible(TRUE)
  }
  
  observeEvent(input$save_state, save_current_session(silent = FALSE))
  observeEvent(input$load_state, {
    if (!file.exists(plateau_state_file())) { showNotification("No saved session.", type = "warning"); return() }
    state  <- readRDS(plateau_state_file())
    loaded <- load_global_objects(.GlobalEnv)
    sel    <- state$selected %||% "intro"
    if (!sel %in% names(cases)) sel <- "intro"
    selected_case(sel)
    etat$unlocked      <- union("intro", intersect(state$unlocked %||% "intro", names(cases)))
    etat$visited       <- intersect(state$visited %||% character(0), names(cases))
    etat$output_text   <- state$output_text %||% ""
    etat$last_has_plot <- isTRUE(state$last_has_plot)
    etat$run_id        <- state$run_id %||% 0
    if (isTRUE(etat$last_has_plot) && file.exists(plateau_plot_file()))
      etat$plot_file <- plateau_plot_file()
    else { etat$plot_file <- blank_plot; etat$last_has_plot <- FALSE }
    last_save_time(file.info(plateau_state_file())$mtime)
    updateTextInput(session, "reponse", value = "")
    update_plateau_nodes()
    showNotification(paste0("Restored: ", length(loaded), " object(s)."), type = "message")
  })
  observeEvent(input$clear_state, {
    unlink(c(plateau_state_file(), plateau_objects_file(), plateau_plot_file()), force = TRUE)
    last_save_time(NULL)
    showNotification("Save cleared.", type = "message")
  })
  
  output$save_status <- renderUI({
    t <- last_save_time()
    if (is.null(t)) return(span(style = "font-size:12px;", "No saved session"))
    span(style = "font-size:12px;", paste0("Saved at ", format(t, "%H:%M:%S")))
  })
  
  # --- Board ---
  
  node_status <- function(id) {
    if (id %in% etat$visited)       "visitee"
    else if (id %in% etat$unlocked) "deverrouillee"
    else                            "verrouillee"
  }
  node_icon  <- function(id) switch(node_status(id),
                                    visitee = "V ", deverrouillee = "O ", "X ")
  node_label <- function(id) paste0(node_icon(id), cases[[id]]$titre)
  node_group <- function(id) cases[[id]]$partie
  
  make_nodes <- function(initial = FALSE) {
    ids <- names(cases)
    lbl <- if (initial)
      vapply(ids, function(id) paste0(if (id == "intro") "O " else "X ", cases[[id]]$titre), character(1))
    else
      vapply(ids, node_label, character(1))
    nodes <- data.frame(
      id = ids, label = lbl,
      group = vapply(ids, node_group, character(1)),
      shape = "box", fixed = TRUE, physics = FALSE,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    merge(nodes, plateau_positions, by = "id", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
  }
  
  update_plateau_nodes <- function() visNetworkProxy("plateau") |> visUpdateNodes(nodes = make_nodes())
  
  output$plateau <- renderVisNetwork({
    graph <- visNetwork(make_nodes(initial = TRUE), edges, height = "220px")
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(parties)))
      graph <- visGroups(graph, groupname = parties$id[i],
                         color = list(background = parties$color[i], border = parties$border[i]))
    graph |>
      visNodes(shape = "box", font = list(size = 13), margin = 8, borderWidth = 2) |>
      visEdges(arrows = "to", smooth = FALSE, color = list(color = "#777777"),
               font = list(size = 10, align = "middle")) |>
      visPhysics(enabled = FALSE, stabilization = FALSE) |>
      visInteraction(dragNodes = FALSE, dragView = TRUE, zoomView = TRUE,
                     navigationButtons = FALSE, keyboard = FALSE, hover = FALSE) |>
      visOptions(highlightNearest = FALSE) |>
      visEvents(selectNode = "function(nodes) {
        if (nodes.nodes.length > 0)
          Shiny.setInputValue('case_clicked', nodes.nodes[0], {priority: 'event'});
      }")
  })
  
  session$onFlushed(function() {
    visNetworkProxy("plateau") |> visFit(nodes = names(cases), animation = FALSE)
  }, once = TRUE)
  
  observeEvent(input$case_clicked, {
    id <- input$case_clicked
    if (is.null(id) || !id %in% names(cases)) return()
    selected_case(id)
    updateTextInput(session, "reponse", value = "")
  }, ignoreNULL = TRUE)
  
  observeEvent(input$fit_plateau,    visNetworkProxy("plateau") |> visFit(nodes = names(cases), animation = list(duration = 500)))
  observeEvent(input$focus_selected, { id <- selected_case(); req(id); visNetworkProxy("plateau") |> visFocus(id = id, scale = 0.9, animation = list(duration = 500)) })
  observeEvent(input$zoom_case,      { id <- selected_case(); req(id); visNetworkProxy("plateau") |> visFocus(id = id, scale = 1.4, animation = list(duration = 500)) })
  
  # --- Case info ---
  
  output$case_info <- renderUI({
    id <- selected_case(); req(id); x <- cases[[id]]
    couleur <- partie_color[[ x$partie ]]
    bordure <- partie_border[[ x$partie ]]
    tagList(
      div(style = "font-weight:bold; font-size:15px; margin-bottom:5px;", x$titre),
      div(style = paste0("display:inline-block; background:", couleur,
                         "; border:2px solid ", bordure,
                         "; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:4px; margin-bottom:6px; font-size:12px;"),
          if (id %in% etat$unlocked) "Unlocked" else "Locked"),
      p(strong("Objective:"), x$objectif),
      p(strong("Reward:"), x$sortie_attendue),
      p(strong("Next:"), x$transition)
    )
  })
  
  output$question_ui <- renderUI({
    id <- selected_case(); req(id); x <- cases[[id]]
    if (id %in% etat$unlocked)
      return(p(style = "color:green; margin-bottom:8px;", "Access granted - click Run"))
    tagList(
      p(strong("Riddle:"), x$question),
      textInput("reponse", "Answer", value = "")
    )
  })
  
  # --- Validation ---
  
  observeEvent(input$valider, {
    id <- selected_case(); req(id); x <- cases[[id]]
    if (id %in% etat$unlocked) { showNotification("Already unlocked.", type = "message"); return() }
    if (check_answer(x, input$reponse)) {
      etat$unlocked <- union(etat$unlocked, id)
      etat$output_text <- paste0("Node unlocked: ", x$titre, "\n\nClick Run.")
      etat$run_id      <- etat$run_id + 1
      update_plateau_nodes()
      save_current_session(silent = TRUE)
      showNotification("Correct answer!", type = "message")
    } else showNotification("Incorrect answer.", type = "error")
  })
  
  # --- Displayed code ---
  
  output$code_affiche <- renderText({
    id <- selected_case(); req(id)
    if (!id %in% etat$unlocked) return("Code locked.")
    get_case_display_code(cases[[id]])
  })
  
  # --- Execution ---
  
  observeEvent(input$executer, {
    id <- selected_case(); req(id)
    if (isTRUE(etat$running)) { showNotification("Already running.", type = "warning"); return() }
    if (!id %in% etat$unlocked) { showNotification("Node locked.", type = "error"); return() }
    etat$running <- TRUE
    on.exit({ etat$running <- FALSE }, add = TRUE)
    x <- cases[[id]]
    withProgress(message = paste("Running:", x$titre), value = 0.2, {
      res <- execute_case(x, envir = .GlobalEnv, blank_plot = blank_plot)
      incProgress(0.6)
      etat$output_text   <- res$output
      etat$plot_file     <- res$plot_file
      etat$last_has_plot <- res$has_plot
      etat$visited       <- union(etat$visited, id)
      etat$run_id        <- etat$run_id + 1
      update_plateau_nodes()
      save_current_session(silent = TRUE)
      incProgress(0.2)
    })
    showNotification("Done.", type = "message")
  })
  
  # --- Outputs ---
  
  output$sortie <- renderText({
    if (!nzchar(etat$output_text)) return("No output yet.\nClick Run.")
    etat$output_text
  })
  
  output$plot_status <- renderUI({
    etat$run_id
    if (isTRUE(etat$last_has_plot)) p("Here is the plot.")
    else p("No plot.")
  })
  
  output$graphique <- renderImage({
    etat$run_id
    list(src = etat$plot_file, contentType = "image/png",
         width = "100%", height = "auto", style = "max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;")
  }, deleteFile = FALSE)
}

shinyApp(ui, server, options = list(display.mode = "normal"))
